Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT 
  s.\\"Name\\" as ticker,
  COUNT\(*\) as total_signals,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL\) as verified,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"Reason\\" = '[BACKFILL]'\) as backfill,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL AND ts.\\"Reason\\" != '[BACKFILL]'\) as usable
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
JOIN \\"Symbols\\" s ON s.\\"Id\\" = ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 days'
GROUP BY s.\\"Name\\"
ORDER BY usable DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -t -c "
SELECT 'L2 Snapshots' as type, COUNT\(*\), MAX\(\\"Timestamp\\"\) FROM \\"SymbolBookSnapshots\\" WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 04:00:00'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Trading Signals', COUNT\(*\), MAX\(\\"Timestamp\\"\) FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 04:00:00'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Symbol Bars', COUNT\(*\), MAX\(\\"Timestamp\\"\) FROM \\"SymbolBars\\" WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 04:00:00'
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -t -c "
-- L2 snapshots: check for gaps by looking at per-hour counts
SELECT 
    date_trunc\('hour', \\"Timestamp\\"\) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as hour_et,
    COUNT\(*\) as snapshots,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT \\"SymbolId\\"\) as symbols
FROM \\"SymbolBookSnapshots\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 13:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -t -c "
-- Check exact cutoff time and when data resumed
SELECT 
    \\"SymbolId\\",
    MAX\(\\"Timestamp\\"\) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as last_data_et
FROM \\"SymbolBookSnapshots\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 13:00:00'
GROUP BY \\"SymbolId\\"
ORDER BY 2 DESC
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -t -c "
-- Trading signals per hour
SELECT 
    date_trunc\('hour', \\"Timestamp\\"\) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as hour_et,
    COUNT\(*\) as signals
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 13:00:00'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -t -c "
SELECT 
    \\"Timeframe\\",
    COUNT\(*\) as bars,
    MIN\(\\"Timestamp\\"\) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as earliest_et,
    MAX\(\\"Timestamp\\"\) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as latest_et,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT \\"SymbolId\\"\) as symbols
FROM \\"SymbolBars\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-18 04:00:00'
GROUP BY \\"Timeframe\\"
ORDER BY \\"Timeframe\\"
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT pt.\\"Ticker\\", pt.\\"Side\\", pt.\\"Quantity\\", pt.\\"EntryPrice\\", pt.\\"ExitPrice\\", 
       pt.\\"RealizedPnl\\", pt.\\"Status\\", pt.\\"HoldTimeMinutes\\",
       \(pt.\\"EntryTime\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as entry_et,
       \(pt.\\"ExitTime\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as exit_et,
       pt.\\"ExitReason\\", pt.\\"SignalScore\\"
FROM \\"AppPaperTrades\\" pt
ORDER BY pt.\\"EntryTime\\" DESC
LIMIT 30;
")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "\\dt App*")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\", ts.\\"Type\\", ts.\\"Strength\\", ts.\\"Score\\", ts.\\"Price\\",
       ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\", ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\", ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\", ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\",
       \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as ts_et,
       ts.\\"Reason\\",
       ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\", ts.\\"Wobi\\", ts.\\"Rsi14\\", ts.\\"VolumeRatio\\", ts.\\"TickMomentum\\"
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
ORDER BY ts.\\"Timestamp\\" DESC
LIMIT 40;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\", ts.\\"Type\\",
       COUNT\(*\) as total,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as correct_1m,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as correct_5m,
       ROUND\(AVG\(ts.\\"Score\\"\)::numeric, 4\) as avg_score,
       ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
           CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 0 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 100
                ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 100 END
       END\)::numeric, 4\) as avg_1m_pct,
       ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
           CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 0 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 100
                ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 100 END
       END\)::numeric, 4\) as avg_5m_pct
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
  AND ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\", ts.\\"Type\\"
ORDER BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\", ts.\\"Type\\";
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Win rate summary: what % of signals are correct?
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\", ts.\\"Type\\",
       COUNT\(*\) as total_signals,
       ROUND\(100.0 * SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) / COUNT\(*\)::numeric, 1\) as winrate_1m,
       ROUND\(100.0 * SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) / COUNT\(*\)::numeric, 1\) as winrate_5m,
       ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
           CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 0 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000
                ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END
       END\)::numeric, 2\) as avg_1m_bps,
       ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
           CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 0 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000
                ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END
       END\)::numeric, 2\) as avg_5m_bps
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
  AND ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\", ts.\\"Type\\"
ORDER BY avg_5m_bps ASC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Signal frequency: how many per hour?
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\",
       date_trunc\('hour', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) as hour_et,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as buy_count,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as sell_count
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\", date_trunc\('hour', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)
ORDER BY hour_et DESC, ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
LIMIT 40;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Corrected type mapping \(1=Buy, 2=Sell\) - signal frequency last 2 days
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\",
       date_trunc\('hour', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) as hour_et,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as buy_count,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as sell_count
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 days'
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\", date_trunc\('hour', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 10
ORDER BY hour_et DESC, ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
LIMIT 50;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Check how many signals have ObiSmoothed = 0
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) as total,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"ObiSmoothed\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as obi_zero,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"Wobi\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as wobi_zero,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"TickMomentum\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as tick_zero,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"Ema9\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as ema9_zero,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"Rsi14\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as rsi14_zero,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"VolumeRatio\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as vol_zero,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"Vwap\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as vwap_zero
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days';
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Day-by-day win rate and P&L \(5-min outcome\) for last 20 days
SELECT 
  date_trunc\('day', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)::date as day,
  COUNT\(*\) as signals,
  ROUND\(100.0 * SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) / NULLIF\(SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\), 0\)::numeric, 1\) as winrate_5m,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
      CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000
           ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END
  END\)::numeric, 2\) as avg_5m_bps,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as buys,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as sells
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 days'
GROUP BY date_trunc\('day', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)::date
ORDER BY day DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Day-by-day BUY vs SELL win rates separately
SELECT 
  date_trunc\('day', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)::date as day,
  ts.\\"Type\\" as side,
  COUNT\(*\) as signals,
  ROUND\(100.0 * SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) / NULLIF\(SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\), 0\)::numeric, 1\) as winrate_5m,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
      CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000
           ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END
  END\)::numeric, 2\) as avg_5m_bps
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 days'
  AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY date_trunc\('day', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)::date, ts.\\"Type\\"
ORDER BY day DESC, side;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- The flip-flop pattern: Buy P&L vs Sell P&L day by day
SELECT 
  date_trunc\('day', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)::date as day,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
      \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END\)::numeric, 1\) as buy_bps,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
      \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END\)::numeric, 1\) as sell_bps,
  COUNT\(*\) as vol
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 days'
  AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- When did OBI/WOBI start being zero? Check by day
SELECT 
  date_trunc\('day', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\)::date as day,
  COUNT\(*\) as total,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as obi_zero,
  ROUND\(100.0 * SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) / COUNT\(*\)::numeric, 1\) as obi_zero_pct,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\" != 0 AND ts.\\"Wobi\\" != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as both_nonzero
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '20 days'
GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Check if OBI zero correlates with signal source \(SWIN vs RULE vs weighted\)
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN ts.\\"Reason\\" LIKE '[SWIN]%' THEN 'SWIN'
       WHEN ts.\\"Reason\\" LIKE '[RULE%' THEN 'RULE'
       ELSE 'OTHER' END as source,
  COUNT\(*\) as total,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as obi_zero,
  ROUND\(100.0 * SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\" = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) / COUNT\(*\)::numeric, 1\) as obi_zero_pct
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" > NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Mar 17 was the ONLY day with nonzero OBI. What happened?
-- Check what time on Mar 17 they started/stopped
SELECT 
  date_trunc\('hour', \(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) as hour_et,
  COUNT\(*\) as total,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"ObiSmoothed\\" != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as obi_nonzero,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL THEN 
      CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000
           ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) / ts.\\"Price\\" * 10000 END
  END\)::numeric, 2\) as avg_5m_bps
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" BETWEEN '2026-03-17'::date AND '2026-03-18 05:00'::timestamp
GROUP BY hour_et ORDER BY hour_et;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT 
  DATE\(\(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) AS date_et,
  COUNT\(*\) AS signals,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS buys,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"Type\\" = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS sells
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
GROUP BY date_et
ORDER BY date_et DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT 
  DATE\(\(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) AS date_et,
  COUNT\(*\) AS tick_snapshots
FROM \\"TickSnapshots\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
GROUP BY date_et
ORDER BY date_et DESC;
")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c dt)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT 
  DATE\(\(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) AS date_et,
  COUNT\(*\) AS l2_snapshots
FROM \\"SymbolBookSnapshots\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
GROUP BY date_et
ORDER BY date_et DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT \\"Ticker\\", COUNT\(*\) AS cnt,
  MIN\(\(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) AS first_et,
  MAX\(\(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) AS last_et
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 days'
GROUP BY \\"Ticker\\"
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT s.\\"Ticker\\", COUNT\(*\) AS cnt,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS buys,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS sells
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
JOIN \\"Symbols\\" s ON s.\\"Id\\" = ts.\\"TickerId\\"
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 days'
  AND DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-19'
GROUP BY s.\\"Ticker\\"
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15;
")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c '\\d TradingSignals')
Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c '\\d Symbols')

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\", COUNT\(*\) AS cnt,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS buys,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS sells,
  ROUND\(AVG\(ts.\\"Score\\"\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_score
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-20'
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Check accuracy on yesterday's verified signals
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\",
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" IS NOT NULL\) AS verified_1m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true\) AS correct_1m,
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true\) / NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" IS NOT NULL\), 0\), 1\) AS pct_1m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" IS NOT NULL\) AS verified_5m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true\) AS correct_5m,
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true\) / NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" IS NOT NULL\), 0\), 1\) AS pct_5m
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-19'
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
ORDER BY verified_1m DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Compare accuracy: yesterday vs day before
SELECT 
  DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) AS date_et,
  COUNT\(*\) AS total,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" IS NOT NULL\) AS verified_1m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true\) AS correct_1m,
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true\) / NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\" IS NOT NULL\), 0\), 1\) AS pct_1m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" IS NOT NULL\) AS verified_5m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true\) AS correct_5m,
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true\) / NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\" IS NOT NULL\), 0\), 1\) AS pct_5m
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE ts.\\"Timestamp\\" >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 days'
GROUP BY date_et
ORDER BY date_et DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Outcome analysis: what happens AFTER signals by time horizon
-- For BUY signals \(Type=1\): correct if price goes UP
-- For SELL signals \(Type=2\): correct if price goes DOWN
WITH signals AS \(
  SELECT 
    ts.\\"Type\\",
    ts.\\"Price\\",
    ts.\\"Score\\",
    ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\",
    ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\",
    ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\",
    ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\",
    CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 AND ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL 
         THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\)
         WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 AND ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL 
         THEN \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\"\)
    END AS pnl_1m,
    CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL 
         THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\)
         WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 2 AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL 
         THEN \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\)
    END AS pnl_5m
  FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
  WHERE DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-19'
    AND ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" IS NOT NULL
\)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN \\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 'BUY' ELSE 'SELL' END AS direction,
  COUNT\(*\) AS total,
  -- 1-min outcomes
  ROUND\(AVG\(pnl_1m\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pnl_1m,
  ROUND\(PERCENTILE_CONT\(0.25\) WITHIN GROUP \(ORDER BY pnl_1m\)::numeric, 4\) AS p25_1m,
  ROUND\(PERCENTILE_CONT\(0.50\) WITHIN GROUP \(ORDER BY pnl_1m\)::numeric, 4\) AS median_1m,
  ROUND\(PERCENTILE_CONT\(0.75\) WITHIN GROUP \(ORDER BY pnl_1m\)::numeric, 4\) AS p75_1m,
  -- 5-min outcomes
  ROUND\(AVG\(pnl_5m\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pnl_5m,
  ROUND\(PERCENTILE_CONT\(0.50\) WITHIN GROUP \(ORDER BY pnl_5m\)::numeric, 4\) AS median_5m
FROM signals
GROUP BY \\"Type\\"
ORDER BY \\"Type\\";
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- How many signals are correct at 1min but WRONG at 5min? \(exits too late\)
-- vs correct at 5min but wrong at 1min? \(exits too early\)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN \\"Type\\" = 1 THEN 'BUY' ELSE 'SELL' END AS dir,
  COUNT\(*\) AS total,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" AND \\"WasCorrect5Min\\"\) AS correct_both,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" AND NOT \\"WasCorrect5Min\\"\) AS correct_1m_wrong_5m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE NOT \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" AND \\"WasCorrect5Min\\"\) AS wrong_1m_correct_5m,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE NOT \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" AND NOT \\"WasCorrect5Min\\"\) AS wrong_both,
  -- The key insight: signals that START right but REVERSE
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" AND NOT \\"WasCorrect5Min\\"\) / 
    NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" IS NOT NULL AND \\"WasCorrect5Min\\" IS NOT NULL\), 0\), 1\) AS pct_reversal
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE DATE\(\(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-19'
  AND \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" IS NOT NULL AND \\"WasCorrect5Min\\" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY \\"Type\\";
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Score strength vs outcome: do strong signals perform better?
WITH signals AS \(
  SELECT 
    ts.\\"Type\\",
    ABS\(ts.\\"Score\\"\) AS abs_score,
    CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\)
         ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\"\) END AS pnl_1m,
    CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\" = 1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\)
         ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\) END AS pnl_5m,
    ts.\\"WasCorrect1Min\\",
    ts.\\"WasCorrect5Min\\"
  FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
  WHERE DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-19'
    AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL
\)
SELECT
  CASE 
    WHEN abs_score >= 0.6 THEN 'strong \(>=0.6\)'
    WHEN abs_score >= 0.4 THEN 'medium \(0.4-0.6\)'
    WHEN abs_score >= 0.2 THEN 'weak \(0.2-0.4\)'
    ELSE 'noise \(<0.2\)'
  END AS strength,
  COUNT\(*\) AS total,
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"WasCorrect1Min\\"\) / NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\), 0\), 1\) AS win_1m,
  ROUND\(100.0 * COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE \\"WasCorrect5Min\\"\) / NULLIF\(COUNT\(*\), 0\), 1\) AS win_5m,
  ROUND\(AVG\(pnl_1m\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pnl_1m,
  ROUND\(AVG\(pnl_5m\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pnl_5m
FROM signals
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- What does the TradingSignals table actually have for PriceAfter columns?
SELECT column_name, data_type 
FROM information_schema.columns 
WHERE table_name = 'TradingSignals' 
  AND column_name LIKE 'PriceAfter%' OR column_name LIKE 'WasCorrect%'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=JetNet@Core0 psql -h localhost -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Per-symbol: average PnL at different time horizons to understand alpha decay
SELECT ts.\\"SymbolId\\",
  COUNT\(*\) AS n,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\"=1 THEN ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\" ELSE ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" END\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pnl_1m,
  ROUND\(AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\"=1 THEN ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\" ELSE ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" END\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pnl_5m,
  -- Also show as % of price
  ROUND\(100.0 * AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\"=1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\)/ts.\\"Price\\" ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter1Min\\"\)/ts.\\"Price\\" END\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pct_1m,
  ROUND\(100.0 * AVG\(CASE WHEN ts.\\"Type\\"=1 THEN \(ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" - ts.\\"Price\\"\)/ts.\\"Price\\" ELSE \(ts.\\"Price\\" - ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\"\)/ts.\\"Price\\" END\)::numeric, 4\) AS avg_pct_5m
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\" ts
WHERE DATE\(\(ts.\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York'\) = '2026-03-19'
  AND ts.\\"PriceAfter5Min\\" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ts.\\"SymbolId\\"
ORDER BY n DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Summary: how many signals today by symbol and type, plus accuracy
SELECT \\"SymbolId\\", 
       CASE \\"Type\\" WHEN 0 THEN 'Buy' WHEN 1 THEN 'Buy' WHEN 2 THEN 'Sell' END as direction,
       COUNT\(*\) as signals,
       COUNT\(\\"PriceAfter1Min\\"\) as verified,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"WasCorrect1Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as correct_1m,
       SUM\(CASE WHEN \\"WasCorrect5Min\\" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as correct_5m
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-20 04:00:00'
GROUP BY \\"SymbolId\\", \\"Type\\"
ORDER BY \\"SymbolId\\", \\"Type\\";" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='JetNet@Core0' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U jetnet -d TradingPilot -c "
-- Check signals that are likely entries \(strong scores, rule-based\)
-- Type 1=Buy, 2=Sell. Look at Reason for ENTRY/EXIT patterns
SELECT \\"SymbolId\\", \\"Type\\", \\"Score\\"::numeric\(6,4\), \\"Price\\", 
       \(\\"Timestamp\\" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'\) AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' as \\"TimeET\\",
       LEFT\(\\"Reason\\", 80\) as reason,
       \\"Imbalance\\"::numeric\(6,4\),
       \\"SpreadPercentile\\"::numeric\(4,2\),
       \\"Spread\\"
FROM \\"TradingSignals\\"
WHERE \\"Timestamp\\" >= '2026-03-20 04:00:00'
  AND \\"Score\\"::numeric > 0.35
  AND \\"Type\\" = 1
ORDER BY \\"Timestamp\\"
LIMIT 30;" 2>&1)
